title: Cheesy Greek Pie
description: A delicious and savory pie filled with gooey cheese and greek flavors.
instructions: Roll out the pie crust and place in a pie dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the greek cheese, butter, baked egg, greek seasoning, and salt.
Pour the cheese mixture into the pie crust.
Bake the pie for 25-30 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove from oven and sprinkle with fresh parsley.
Let cool for a few minutes before serving.
